postal_address.line1: Glassdoor Inc. c/o CT Corporation, 330 North Brand Boulevard

request_notes.special_instructions: EU GDPR representative: Glassdoor Hiring Solutions Ireland Ltd. UK GDPR representative: Glassdoor Global Ltd. Data rights requests (access, delete, rectify, export) should be submitted via the self-service Privacy Requests portal. Identity verification is required via registered email address upon submission. DPO email (dpo@glassdoor.com) is for policy/data processing inquiries only. GDPR-specific queries can also be directed to gdpr@glassdoor.com.
Use the Google DSAR webform. You must be signed in to your Google Account. UK users: Google LLC is the data controller; UK Representative is Google UK Ltd.

paypal.com.legal_entity_name: PayPal (Europe) S.à r.l. et Cie, S.C.A.

request_notes.special_instructions: Send SAR to dpo@paypal.com. Include your PayPal email address and any relevant transaction details to help locate your data.

polymarket.com.legal_entity_name: Adventure One QSS Inc. (international) / Blockratize Inc.

request_notes.special_instructions: WARNING: Polymarket's international platform is operated by Adventure One QSS Inc. (Panama). No dedicated privacy/DPO contact is publicly available. Send to hello@polymarket.com referencing GDPR Article 15. Note: GDPR enforcement against this entity is uncertain given Panama jurisdiction. Consider also contacting UK ICO if no response within 30 days.
